Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
136 
LINE_MDCR_COINSRNC_PD_AMT 
LABEL: 
Line Medicare Coinsurance Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The amount paid by Medicaid/CHIP or the managed care plan on this claim on the claim line level 
toward the beneficiary’s Medicare coinsurance. 
SHORT NAME: LINE_MDCR_COINSRNC_PD_AMT 
LONG NAME: LINE_MDCR_COINSRNC_PD_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
RX
